# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
class AdminDashboard {
    protected $pdo;

    public function __construct($pdo) {
        $this->pdo = $pdo;
    }

    public function generateReport() {
        $status = isset($_POST['status']) ? $_POST['status'] : null;
        $category = isset($_POST['category']) ? $_POST['category'] : null;
        $dateStart = isset($_POST['date_start']) ? $_POST['date_start'] : null;
        $dateEnd = isset($_POST['date_end']) ? $_POST['date_end'] : null;

        $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
        $params = [];

        if($status) {
            $sql .= " AND status = :status";
            $params[':status'] = $status;
        }
        
        if($category) {
            $sql .= " AND category = :category";
            $params[':category'] = $category;
        }

        if($dateStart) {
            $sql .= " AND date >= :dateStart";
            $params[':dateStart'] = $dateStart;
        }
        
        if($dateEnd) {
            $sql .= " AND date <= :dateEnd";
            $params[':dateEnd'] = $dateEnd;
        }

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        $stmt->execute($params);
        return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    }
}
?>
